attacks.name: Strike
special_rules: After this attack is resolved, this character gains ENERGY equal to WOUNDS dealt.
Wild Shock: After this attack is resolved, the target character gains the Shock special condition

attacks.name: Blaster Pistol
special_rules: After this attack is resolved, this character gains 1 ENERGY.

attacks.name: Shock Sword Assault
special_rules: After this attack is resolved, place this character within RANGE 1 of the target.
Wild Stun: After this attack is resolved, the target character gains the Stun special condition

superpowers.name: Assassin
rules: This character cannot contest, interact with, or hold Objective tokens. Addionally, this character may reroll any number of its attack dice when attacking a character that is holding or contesting an Objetive token.

superpowers.name: Cybernetic Enchancetements
rules: This character may reroll one die in its defense rolls. Addionally, at the start of this character's activation, remove one WOUNDS from it.

attacks.name: Strike
special_rules: After this attack is resolved, this character gains ENERGY equal to WOUNDS dealt.

attacks.name: Vibranium Spear Thrust
special_rules: Wild Pierce: Change one of the defending character's CRIT, WILD or DEFENSE results to a blank.
Wild Flurry: After this attack is resolved, this character may make a Strike attack.

superpowers.name: Bodyguard
rules: When a another allied character within RANGE 2 of this character is targeted by an attack, this character may use this superpower. This character becomes target of the attack regardlessof RANGE and LoS.

superpowers.name: General of the Dora Milaje
rules: This character may reroll one die in its defensive rolls.

superpowers.name: Martial Artist
rules: When this character is defending against a PHYSICAL or ENERGY attack targeting it from within RANGE 2, this character adds BLANK in its defensive roll in total successes.

special_rules: After this attack is resolved, this character gains ENERGY equal to WOUNDS dealt.

superpowers.name: Martial Artist
rules: When this character is defending against a PHYSICAL or ENERGY attack targeting it from within RANGE 2, this character adds BLANK in its defensive roll in total successes.

leadership.name: Shadow War
rules: When an allied character attacks an enemy character holding or contesting an objective, it may reroll 1 of its attack dice. This Leadership ability can reroll FAIL results.

attacks.name: Coordinated Strike
special_rules: After this attack is resolved, this character gains Power equal to the Damage dealt.
After this attack is resolved, if there is not an allied Hand Ninjas character in play, place it in play within Range 1 of this character with an Activated token. It is part of your squad.

attacks.name: Baton Strike
special_rules: This attack ignores LOS, and the defending character does not benefit from cover.
Pursuit: Before WOUND is dealt, this character may advance Short toward the target character.

attacks.name: Demon's Devastation
special_rules: If an allied Hand Ninjas character is within Range 2 of the target character, add 2 dice to the attack roll.
Wild Vanish: After this attack is resolved, place this character within Range 2.

superpowers.name: Radar Sense
rules: When defending against Physical or Energy attacks, this character adds blanks in its defense roll to its total successes.

superpowers.name: Stealth
rules: Characters must be within Range 3 of this character to target it with attacks.

superpowers.name: There is Only the Beast
rules: The next time the Demon's Devastation attack is used this activation, its range becomes A2.

attacks.name: Strike
special_rules: After the attack is resolved, this character gains 1 ENERGY.

superpowers.name: Faithfull Assistant
rules: Choose another allied character within RANGE 3 of this character. It gains 1 ENERGY. A character may be affected by this superpower once per round.

superpowers.name: Medidate
rules: Action: This character gains 1 ENERGY.

superpowers.name: Servent to the Sorcerer Supreme
rules: While within RANGE 3 of an allied Stephen Vicent Strange, this character adds 1 die to its defensive rolls.
